purpose: Fail-closed control-plane protection. protected_roots governs ACCESS: any matching path is denied to standard-builder tasks, and a new file under a protected root is protected from creation. digest_roots governs DIGEST MEMBERSHIP only and never weakens access. A security-maintenance task may touch only the exact paths named in its owner-issued authority artifact. Trust-granting and CI-executed surfaces are covered in full: tools/** (registered validators, liveness gates, supervisor, key tooling), tests/** (CI gates on them), requirements-ci.txt (the sole CI supply-chain input) and .bro/policy.json (selects the operating mode). Bytecode caches (__pycache__/*.pyc) are excluded from the digest by runtime/bro_protected.py, never listed here.
